# Help Law Group

> Help Law Group connects survivors of abuse, unsafe products, and institutional harm with experienced mass tort and class action attorneys. Free, confidential case evaluations. No fees unless you win.

## About

Help Law Group is a legal advocacy organization with its own attorneys and a network of legal partners across the country. We review your situation and connect you with an attorney who has specific experience handling your type of case.

We handle cases involving:
- Clergy and religious institution sexual abuse
- Medical professional sexual abuse and misconduct
- Online platform harm and exploitation (Snapchat, Roblox, Instagram)
- Juvenile detention facility abuse
- Foster care abuse
- Rideshare assault
- Social media addiction harm
- Unsafe products and defective medical devices
- Data breaches and privacy violations

## How It Works

1. Tell us what happened — you do not need to have it all figured out
2. An experienced attorney reviews your case
3. You understand your legal options
4. You decide if and when to move forward

There is no cost for the initial case evaluation. Attorneys work on contingency — their fee comes from what your case recovers. If your case does not succeed, you owe nothing.

## Legal

This is attorney advertising. Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome. Help Law Group provides general legal information; this content is not a substitute for legal advice from a licensed attorney.
